message:
Merge pull request #1739 from sjsyrek/fix/gitignore-template-gaps

fix(doctor): add rotated daemon logs to gitignore template and skip rewrite when current

files.patch:
@@ -22,6 +22,7 @@ const GitignoreTemplate = `# SQLite databases
 # Daemon runtime files
 daemon.lock
 daemon.log
+daemon-*.log.gz
 daemon.pid
 bd.sock
 sync-state.json
